topDirs.server: Server routes, middleware, and API handlers.
topDirs.public: Static assets served from the site root.

snapshot.overview: This appears to be a Nuxt application.
invariants: Keep file-based routes and layouts aligned with Nuxt conventions.
Do not expose server-only secrets through public runtime config.
conventions: Treat package.json as the package manifest.
Use pages/, layouts/, server/, and plugins/ according to Nuxt conventions.
